description: Legal query addressed to Avraham Maimonides with his autograph responsum. Two Jews were travelling together, and one had confided to the other some goods (qumāsh) and money. The other left with Christian etc. Answer: The careless carrier is responsible if claim is properly established. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
